hero.headline:
Building Excellence,
Engineering Trust
hero.subheadline: Construction, facades, windows, interiors and renovations across Switzerland

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: We combine building envelope work, interior finishing and surface craftsmanship into clearly coordinated construction and renovation solutions for homes, apartments and commercial spaces in Switzerland.

facade.title: Facade Construction
facade.description: We plan and build facades for new construction and renovation: substructure, insulation, cladding and clean junctions. The result is a weather-resistant, energy-conscious building envelope with a precise architectural finish.

tiling.title: Tile & Stone Laying
tiling.description: Ceramic tiles, porcelain stoneware, natural stone and mosaics for bathrooms, kitchens, living areas, stairs and outdoor spaces. We focus on substrate preparation, falls, waterproofing, exact joints and a durable clean finish.

parquet.title: Parquet Flooring
parquet.description: Precise parquet work from substrate build-up to final surface treatment. Whether renovation, new installation or refresh, we create warm and robust timber floors with calm patterns and careful detailing.

painting.title: Painting & Plastering
painting.description: Interior and exterior painting, plastering, skim coating and surface preparation from one team. For smooth walls, protected facades and rooms that feel clean, refined and professionally finished.

windows.title: Window Installation
windows.description: Windows measured precisely, installed professionally and connected airtight. High-quality window installation improves thermal insulation, sound protection, security and comfort in both new builds and renovations.

renovation.title: Renovation & Conversion
renovation.description: Renovations and conversions with clear coordination of trades - from demolition and interior build-out to final surfaces. Existing buildings are modernised, upgraded and made practical for everyday use.

shower.title: Custom Shower Glass & Enclosures
shower.description: Custom shower glass and enclosures for niches, corners, walk-in solutions and special dimensions. We handle consultation, measurement, ordering, installation and service for bright, low-maintenance bathrooms.

projects.title: Selected Projects
projects.subtitle: A curated selection of our finest construction and renovation work.

about.title: About Martin Projekt Group
about.subtitle: Swiss craftsmanship since day one.
about.body: Martin Projekt Group is a Swiss construction and renovation company for facades, windows, interior finishing and high-quality surfaces. We approach every project from the substance of the building: clean substrates, precise junctions, suitable materials and reliable coordination. This creates solutions that work in daily use, look refined and help protect the long-term value of the property.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Materials and systems are selected for the use case, the substrate and the level of wear they need to withstand.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Exact measurements, clean junctions and controlled details define the final result.

reliability.title: Reliability
reliability.description: Clear processes, transparent communication and punctual execution from first appointment to handover.

craftsmanship.title: Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Experienced hands for facades, floors, walls, windows and glass solutions - visible in every detail.

metaTitle: Martin Projekt Group GmbH – Construction, Renovations and Installation
metaDescription: Construction, facade work, window installation, interior finishing and renovations in Switzerland. Precise work for apartments, houses and commercial spaces.

impressum.heading: Legal Notice
impressum.disclaimerText: The contents of this website have been created with the utmost care. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or topicality of the content. Use of this website is at your own risk.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1p: Martin Projekt Group GmbH, -, Switzerland. Contact: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
privacy.s2p: Through our contact form we collect: full name, email address, phone number (optional), and project description. This data is used solely to process your inquiry.
privacy.s3p: Your data is used solely to respond to your inquiry and to establish a potential business relationship. We do not use your data for marketing purposes or share it with third parties without your consent.
privacy.s4p: For email delivery we use Resend Inc. (resend.com) as a data processor. This service receives the form data to forward it to us, based on a data processing agreement.
privacy.s5p: Your inquiry data will be deleted after full resolution of the matter and expiry of any applicable statutory retention periods.
privacy.s6p: Under the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (nDSG) you have the right to access, correction, deletion, restriction of processing, data portability, and objection. Contact: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
privacy.s7p: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc. (vercel.com). All data transmissions are encrypted via HTTPS/TLS.
privacy.s8p: For all data protection inquiries: info@martinprojektgroup.ch
